query_normalized: transferability of dft‑d3 dispersion to ionic liquids chemistry
rationale: The paper studies electronic polarizabilities and refractive indices of ionic liquids, without addressing DFT‑D3 dispersion corrections or their transferability; it does not measure the same mechanism (dispersion) nor any of the independent/dependent variables central to the user's question. Hence it is not relevant for the literature review on DFT‑D3 dispersion in ionic liquids.
